title: Dweebscape: Eleen's Origins
description:
An addon to the Origins mod that adds a few custom origins. 
Kind of an inside joke, but also easily usable outside of my niche friend group.
body:
This mod adds in 9 new Origins!
Each based around a character of mine, these origins are specially hand crafted.

I hope you enjoy them!

9 Origins
9 Evolutions
and a whole lot of love put into making this mod!

Each Origin was made with care, based around characters from my personal setting!
There's a range of playstyles here, so I'm going to keep the descriptions for each one brief!
The quick sparknote version of each origin:
  * Mimic
    - Another water-weakened critter, but this time, it's based around the more stalwart form of the mimic! Use your chest and storing stuff to make things!
  * Aetheria 
     - Water is very bad, it's downright lethal, you're a robot rabbit with a great jump with no need to eat, just watch your battery. heal yourself with iron by integrating it with you cuz you don't have any health regen from hunger!
  * Bonnie
     - Water slows you down, rain sucks, you're short, and can mine stone with your hands.
  * Dweeb
     - kitsune, thrives at night, nether is dangerous, hot biomes suck, and you only eat specific foods because you're very particular about what you like to eat. you don't regenerate health from hunger during the day.
  * Eleen 
     - living plushie, water bad; damaging things is pretty hard with plushie paws, but you excel at cat things. you don't heal with hunger, instead stitch yourself back together with some string!
  * Manticore
    - cat-bug! immunity to poison, hunger, and wither while also being a tad bit fragile, however spiders, and the other bug-like monsters will typically ignore you! you also have spiny fur that while your healthy, deals damage back at your attacker!
* Letrian 
   - dragon foxes with a fair bit of heft to them, they move slower. They can consume sugar to gain a mining speed buff at the cost of becoming hungrier faster, and can gain regeneration from eating sweet berries! they're lucky creatures and have a small amount of Fortune naturally, however helmets cannot be worn given the race's horns!
* Cinderace
  - Speedy, rabbit pokemon! however, that speed comes at a cost of being vegetarian as well as taking more damage when hit. they have a special projectile attack that fires a barrage of two blaze fireballs at their enemies! water is hazardous to them, so maybe don't go for too long of a swim...
* Beanish (Fawful)
  - in reference to the mario and luigi RPG games, this origin has some natural armor, a storage solution, and a fury bar that increases from damage taken, on top of a natural elytra. however, this isn't without setbacks, as this origin is vegetarian, can't equip helmets, and their storage is dropped when they die, making things quite challenging. They also have a special 'Laser Arrow' that can be used to deal some damage!
